prompt: Oshikoodha oshi landula otashi galikana nawa. Oshi li pamwe noprograma yinene nokuli ina na omafadhilomo nenge ofungshoni yinene. Ofungshoni oya tungwa mu C yoye (HAI C++). Oya kuthwa komeho nokumugoyo kokukoleka kokutatu mokandando koshikoodha shimwe.

Oshikoodi osho osha hala oku gandja sha nawa. Osha li oshikandjo shoshilongo shinene sha osho inashi na omafandjamo nenge omainda oshinene. Oshifungshoni osha tungwa mo C++ na omafandjamo ga C++ osho osho sha vule okuningilwa. Osha kuthwa mo omafandjamo gatatu ga backticks mo oshikandjo shikoodi shimwe.

Ove owa li omuyambi gwa coding ota longo oshinakugwanithwa shi na kwalaka. Landula mo unene oshinakugwanithwa sha docstring na signature ya function osho sha pewa pevi, oku gwedha po function. Oshikode shoye osha li sha landula unene osho sha pewa. Oshitya shoye osha li sha kwatele oshinakugwanithwa shi na kwalaka, omapepa osho na okulandulathana kwa function oku li oshitya shi na kwalaka osho sha longwa (nande osho sha monika mo oshitya sha pewa). Itashi longi okwiimba nande okukonakona function, nande okulongitha main function mo oshitya shoye. Ota longitha C++ na oshinakugwanithwa sha C++ sho sha landulwa. Ota shanga oshikululo shoye shi na kwalaka mo oshitya shimwe shoshikode osha kwatwa ko oma triple backticks.

Ocode sho osha ningwa oku shuna oku galuka. Oshihokololo shoye osha ningwa oku shanga oyindji yokuninga, omapepa osho nokushanga koshifungashona oku shi ningwa oku shi longifwa mo (nale koshinima sho sha monika mo oshinima sha pewwa). Itashi ningwa oku shanga ofungashona osho noku shi longa, noku shi ninga oshifungashona shikukuru mo oshihokololo shoye. Ove ota ninge ofungashona mo C yoye (ITASHI C++). Ocode sho osha ningwa oku va oyindji noku itashi shanga oshinima shoka sha vulu okukutha. Ove ota shange oshihokololo shoye shokuninga oshinima shimwe mo oshikandjamo shocode shimwe sho shikwa kwalunga ko triple backticks.
